title: Mid Semester Examination Schedule
fullContent: The Autumn Mid Semester Examinations are scheduled from September 15th. Check your ERP portal for your specific seating arrangement and exam timings. Carrying your physical ID card is mandatory.

title: End Semester Project Submission
shortContent: Submit your final year project reports by November 30.
fullContent: All final year students must upload their project thesis signed by their respective guides onto the academic portal before 5:00 PM on November 30. No late extensions will be granted.

title: Subject Registration Deadline Extension
fullContent: The deadline for elective choices and subject registration for the upcoming Spring semester has been extended until this Friday at midnight. Ensure all pending dues are cleared.

title: Academic Probation Evaluation
shortContent: Review for students below critical CGPA.
fullContent: Students currently on academic probation must meet with their faculty advisors this Tuesday to finalize their remedial course roadmap.

title: Convocation Degree Verification
fullContent: Graduating students must verify the spelling of their names in both English and Hindi on the ERP system for degree printing before next week.

title: Branch Change Rules Announcement
fullContent: First-year students interested in a branch change must maintain a CGPA above 8.5 without any backlogs. Applications open on July 10th.

title: Summer Course Registration Open
fullContent: Summer term registration is now active for students wishing to clear backlogs in core engineering physics and mathematics subjects.

title: Attendance Policy Enforcement Notice
fullContent: Deans office reiterates that students with less than 75% attendance in any lecture course will be debarred from writing the end-sem exams.

title: National Scholarship Portal Updates
fullContent: Eligible SC/ST/OBC and merit-cum-means students must submit their verified income certificates to the academic block for fee reimbursement.

title: Supplementary Exam Fee Payment
fullContent: The portal for supplementary exam fee payment is open. The fee is ₹500 per paper. Ensure transaction receipts are downloaded.

title: Google PPT and Internship Drive
fullContent: Google will host its Pre-Placement Talk in the main auditorium tomorrow at 4:00 PM. Open to circuit branches. Attendance is highly recommended for resume shortlisting.

title: De Shaw Coding Test Shortlist
fullContent: The results for the DE Shaw online coding round are out. 15 students have skipped to the technical interviews starting tomorrow morning from 8:00 AM via MS Teams.

title: Investment Banking Summer Internships
shortContent: Goldman Sachs profiles open for application.
fullContent: Goldman Sachs is hiring Quant Analysts and Investment Banking interns. Strong proficiency in probability, linear algebra, and C++/Python is required. Apply on CDC portal.

title: Resume Verification Phase 1 Close
fullContent: Ensure all master resumes are locked and verified by the placement committee. Unverified resumes cannot apply for day 1 companies.

title: Mock Interview Sessions by Alumni
fullContent: The alumni network is organizing mock technical and HR rounds this weekend. Slot booking starts tonight on a first-come, first-served basis.

title: HFT Quantitative Trainee Openings
fullContent: An elite HFT firm is offering domestic and international postings for top competitive programmers. CTC packages start at 60+ LPA.

title: Data Science Internship at Microsoft
fullContent: Microsoft India has opened applications for exploratory data science roles. Knowledge of SQL, machine learning primitives, and R/Python is a plus.

title: Compulsory Internship NoC Request
shortContent: Process to generate No Objection Certificates.
fullContent: Students pursuing self-arranged winter internships must upload their offer letters to get a formal No Objection Certificate from the training cell.

title: Consulting Case Study Workshop
fullContent: Learn how to crack guesstimate and business case rounds directly from McKinsey consultants this Saturday in the management auditorium.

title: Core Engineering Placement Drive
fullContent: Tata Motors will visit campus next month for Graduate Engineer Trainee roles. Prepare core concepts of thermodynamics, machine design, and power systems.

title: Revised Mess Menu Announcement
shortContent: Updated menu items for summer cycle.
fullContent: Following feedback from the general body meeting, the hall council has added special items like paneer tikka on Wednesdays and ice cream treats on Sunday nights.

title: Hostel Room Allotment for Freshers
shortContent: Room allocations for the incoming batch.
fullContent: Incoming first-year students have been automatically allocated double-sharing rooms across Halls 3, 4, and 5. Please report directly to the respective hall wardens.

title: Geyser Maintenance and Water Supply Cut
fullContent: Due to routine cleaning of overhead water reservoirs and geyser element replacement, water supply will be suspended in Blocks A and B from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM.

title: Mess Rebate Policy Updates
shortContent: Rules to apply for partial mess refunds.
fullContent: Students staying away from the hall for official events or holidays for more than 5 consecutive days can apply for mess rebates via the online portal.

title: Inter-Hall Sports Equipment Allotment
shortContent: Collect sports kits from the common room.
fullContent: New table tennis rackets, cricket kits, and footballs have arrived. Students can issue them by submitting their hostel check-in cards.

title: Late Night Entry Registration Rules
fullContent: For security tracking, any student entering the hostel perimeter after 11:00 PM must log their entry via the biometric scanner at the main gate.

title: Washing Machine Token Automation
fullContent: The manual token distribution system for common laundry washing machines is replaced by a digital QR payment system starting this Monday.

title: Pest Control Operation in All Blocks
fullContent: An intensive pest and anti-mosquito fumigation drive will take place block-by-block. Please leave your doors accessible during scheduled hours.

title: Hostel Day Celebration Planning
shortContent: Budget meeting for hall alumni dinner.
fullContent: The Hall Management Committee invites entries for the cultural night and decorations for our upcoming annual Hall Day function. Budget proposals are welcome.

title: LAN Port Repair Desk Schedule
fullContent: A dedicated technician from the network systems facility will visit the common room daily to resolve individual room internet LAN port disconnects.

title: Spring Fest Orientation and Auditions
fullContent: The annual socio-cultural fest is seeking volunteers, web developers, public relations coordinates, and sponsorship executives. Orientations start tomorrow.

title: Kshitij Tech Fest Robotics Challenge
fullContent: Registrations are officially open for the flagship Robowars and drone racing events at Kshitij. Prizes worth over ₹5 Lakhs are up for grabs. Teams of up to 4 allowed.

title: Inter-Hall General Championship (GC)
fullContent: The Technology Gymkhana has released the group stage schedules for the Inter-Hall General Championship. Matches kick off under the floodlights this Friday.

title: Music Society Vocal Auditions
shortContent: Auditions for eastern and western bands.
fullContent: Do you sing or play instruments? The campus music society is hosting open jam auditions inside the music room. Bring your own instruments if possible.

title: Finance Club Quant Trainee Selection
fullContent: The Finance Club is initiating its selection track for Quant Trainees. The test consists of brain teasers, puzzle solving, and stochastic processes.

title: Coding Club Hackathon Announcement
fullContent: Form your teams for the annual dev-hack. Build open-source solutions addressing modern student productivity. Unlimited food and coffee provided.

title: Dramatics Club Street Play (Nukkad)
fullContent: The dramatics wing will stage a socially critical street play on mental well-being and campus pressure outside the main canteen arena at 5:00 PM.

title: E-Cell Startup Bootcamp Registration
shortContent: Get mentorship and funding for your ideas.
fullContent: The Entrepreneurship Cell presents a 3-week intensive bootcamp providing structural guidance from venture capitalists. Top ideas receive incubation seed grants.

title: Debating Society Open Selections
fullContent: Test your analytical skills and public speaking fluency. The debating team is holding introductory rounds with hypothetical policy scenarios.

title: Photography Club Photo-Walk Event
fullContent: Join us for a late-evening campus tour focusing on long-exposure photography, astrophotography techniques, and manual camera setting calibration.
